name: Petrules Gate v1 — consensus-divergence conviction engine
narrowing_note: Feature set narrowed from spec v1.0 per Phase 0 audit (verdict NARROW), BEFORE any training data was constructed. Dropped: consensus_revision_momentum (no point-in-time revision history exists at budget — lookahead risk), congressional_trade_direction (free mirrors dead, official sources PDF-only, ~500 filings/yr). Added: implied_move_change_30d as the consensus-expectation dynamics feature. Redefined: disclosed_flow_vs_consensus -> disclosed_flow_vs_implied (consensus direction from options-implied/positioning, not analyst revisions).
consensus_baseline: options-implied move (ThetaData event-dated ATM straddle at T-1) for all setup classes; Alpha Vantage EARNINGS pre-print estimatedEPS used for the earnings divergence label only

point_in_time_rules.13d_13g: filingDate; query both 'SC 13D' and 'SCHEDULE 13D' form names
point_in_time_rules.short_interest: FINRA publication date (settlement + ~7 business days), never settlementDate
point_in_time_rules.options: chain quotes as of date from ThetaData EOD history
point_in_time_rules.estimates: AV EARNINGS estimatedEPS treated as final pre-print snapshot (label only, never a T-90 feature)

model_architecture: XGBoostClassifier, separate direction + magnitude models (calibration requirements differ; combining masks which component fails)

training_window.reason: ThetaData Value options-implied-move history cutoff (empirically 2020-01 served, 2019-10 refused)
training_window.expected_events: ~30,000-40,000 qualifying earnings events (comfortably above the 5,000 minimum)
training_window.extension: to 2012 only via ThetaData STANDARD upgrade filed as a deviation

calibration_pass_criteria.rule: CALIBRATED iff ALL of the above AND a DSR-penalized directional edge at kappa>=0.8 clears its floor. Otherwise NOT_CALIBRATED and the sizer does NOT run.

sizer_params.note: specified but WIRED ONLY after a CALIBRATED verdict

universe: US-listed equities >=$500M market cap at event time, earnings + activist (13D/G) events
hash_lock_method: SHA-256 of json.dumps(doc, indent=2, ensure_ascii=True)+newline with hash_lock="" (verify: blank hash_lock, re-serialize identically, hash)

supersedes.reason: merge of dispatch DRAFT (operator-approved 2026-07-22) before any training data constructed; adds disclosed_flow_form4_cluster to Tier 1 (6 features), carried caveats, feature notes, legal boundary, stricter calibration rule

feature_notes.disclosed_flow_vs_implied: REDEFINED per audit: 'vs consensus' side uses options-implied/positioning direction, NOT revision trend (which is dead). Deviation from original spec — recorded here, not applied silently. (DRAFT alias: disclosed_flow_vs_priced_direction)
feature_notes.disclosed_flow_form4_cluster: Form 4 cluster (>=3 filings in 30d), dated by filingDate; median 56d lead to next earnings, 100% pre-event. Direction-blind in v1 (buy/sell XML parse is a Phase-1 follow-up).
feature_notes.activist_disclosure_recent: EDGAR 13D/G filing dates; query BOTH 'SC 13D' and 'SCHEDULE 13D' form names (2025+ renamed).
feature_notes.institutional_accumulation: 13F filingDate only; value freezes 44-45d after quarter end (stale by construction — a slow-accumulation feature, not a fast signal). (DRAFT alias: institutional_accumulation_13f)

label.surprise_label: Alpha Vantage EARNINGS: (reportedEPS - estimatedEPS), signed, normalized by options-implied move at T-1. Free, final pre-print consensus, back to 1996.
label.divergence_definition: signed realized move vs options-implied expected move, in implied-move units: D = (realized_move(t..t+h) - 0) / implied_move(t), evaluated against the priced-in straddle. Positive = diverged up from priced expectation.

carried_caveats.detail: Two of the original Tier-1 consensus-relative features (the revision-path signals) were dropped for lack of free point-in-time data. The remaining consensus-relative signal leans on disclosed flow + options-implied dynamics. If calibration comes back MARGINAL rather than clean, the named fix is paid revision data (Refinitiv/Zacks) — a known, priced upgrade, not a dead end.

Training window is 2020-present (one macro era: ZIRP tail, 2022 hikes, AI bull). The spec's 'holds across >=2 independent regimes' weld CANNOT be fully satisfied on data lacking a normal-rates value regime. The calibration verdict must state 'calibrated 2020-2026', which is narrower than 'calibrated across regimes'. Named fix: ThetaData STANDARD tier extends history to 2012.

legal_boundary: PUBLIC DISCLOSED DATA ONLY. SEC filings (Form 4, 13D/G, 13F), public price/options/news. No material non-public information, ever — the build agent must refuse any instruction to ingest non-public data.
